note: Offline fallback for the engine registry client. The in-memory cache and live registry fetches take precedence; this snapshot is used only when a registry is unreachable. Regenerated by CI from both registries. Tags follow <pgMajor>[-<extVersion>][-glibc<NNN>]; only pinned (non-moving) tags are listed so the offline default is reproducible. No -glibc<NNN> tags exist upstream yet. Generic comes from Docker Hub (postgresai/extended-postgres); managed providers come from GitLab (registry.gitlab.com/postgres-ai/se-images/<repo>). 'provider' is the probe provider key (provider.go); 'repo' is the registry path — note cloudsql->google-cloud-sql and timescale->timescale-cloud. azure has no SE repo and resolves to the generic image.
